issues.sample: TL*THE CONTACT OWNS A 2014 INFINITI Q70 HYBRID.  THE CONTACT STATED THAT WHILE DRIVING AT APPROXIMATELY 15 MPH AND GOING OVER A RAILROAD TRACK, THE AIRBAGS DEPLOYED INDEPENDENTLY.  THE VEHICLE WAS NOT DIAGNOSED BUT THE BODY DAMAGE WAS REPAIRED.  THE MANUFACTURER WAS NOT NOTIFIED

narrative.headline: What 2014 Infiniti Q70 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 1 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Air Bags (100% of reports).

issues.title: Air Bags
